response.overview: In the small town of Dunwich, Deputy Jones sets out to check on his estranged friend Sam, a loner with a troubling past connected to the town's dark secrets and supernatural rumors. Upon arriving at Sam's isolated home, tensions escalate when he discovers Sam distraught, wielding a knife. The reunion unearths past traumas from their youth, linked to the night Sam's mother mysteriously disappeared.
response.title: Dunwich
